logo: a.custom-logo-link, header a[href='https://blog.agibank.com.br/'], header a[href='/'], .ast-site-identity a
heroArticles: .ast-article-post .entry-title a, article .entry-title a, h2.entry-title a, h1.entry-title a
heroReadMore: a.more-link, a:has-text('Ler mais'), a:has-text('Ler texto'), a:has-text('Continue reading')
articleTitles: article h3 a, article h2 a, .entry-title a
